Permission session                                                              
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
 △ Permission required                                                          
                                                                                
 bash                                                                           
 ls -la                                                                         
                                                                                
 Allow once   Allow always   Reject                                             
                                                                                
⇆ select   enter confirm   esc reject
